title: Manage your organization with WorkCanvas (webinar)

posts.author: Julietteb (Juliette )
posts.cookedHtml:
It is time for another WorkCanvas webinar with the amazing @GuyWorkCanvas!!
This time Guy will be sharing how you can unlock the full potential of WorkCanvas for organizational management, whatever team you are on! . Guy will guides you through managing everything from company org charts to planning hiring processes, conducting interviews, and overseeing team resources like employee evaluations and 1:1 meetings.

Work canvas - Community event speaker highlights1920×1080 91.4 KB

posts.author: Julietteb (Juliette )
posts.cookedHtml: Hi Everyone!! We are changing the date of the event so more of you can attend! We got feedback that August is a time away for most of our community so moving our session to September 4th at the same time!
